prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7132→7419→6620→7141→7323，整体在6600–7400区间波动，近5年均值约7127名；2025年基准位次约7323名，近2年呈小幅后移趋势；该校在青海省物理类招生计划2021–2024年分别为19、19、19、17人，2025年17人，2026年仍为17人，计划连续2年持平，对竞争格局无显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要因招聘公告争议引发舆情，但该事件与本科招生关联度有限；抖音热度排名第76位（一般），未见明显报考热度异常；历史无投档断 档记录；第五轮学科评估植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与物理类招生专业中的植物生产类（农学、园艺、植物保护等）直接对应，对相关专业报 考有一定支撑；211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第135名持续上升至2026年第85名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所上升。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以农学、林学、动物科学、土木类为主，对应学科大类中生化环材为明显劝退、土木建筑为分化观望、机械为分化观望， 整体专业热度偏低；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人（较2025年47669人略有增加），按历史比例估算物理类约30700人，竞争略有加剧。 综合历年位次在6600–7400区间波动、2026年招生计划持平、学校排名持续上升但声誉偏负面、专业热度整体偏低、考生规模小幅增加等因素，在2025年基准7323 名基础上预计竞争略加剧（位次数字小幅前移）；预测最低位次约7293名，区间6793–7793名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7132 → 7419 → 6620 → 7141 → 7323, fluctuating within the 6600–7400 range, with a 5-year average of about 7127; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 7323, showing a slight backward trend in the past 2 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2024 was 19, 19, 19, and 17 respectively, with 17 in 2025 and still 17 in 2026, remaining unchanged for 2 consecutive years, having no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to controversy over recruitment announcements, but this incident has limited relevance to undergraduate admissions; Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (average), with no obvious abnormal application heat; no history of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Plant Production category (Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection, etc.) in Physics Category admissions, providing some support for related major applications; it is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category admissions majors are mainly Agronomy, Forestry, Animal Science, and Civil Engineering, corresponding to major disciplines where Biochemistry, Environmental Science, and Materials are clearly discouraged, Civil Engineering and Architecture are in a wait-and-see state, and Mechanical Engineering is also in a wait-and-see state, resulting in overall low major popularity; the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025), with an estimated Physics Category of about 30,700 based on historical proportions, leading to slightly intensified competition. Considering the historical ranking fluctuation in the 6600–7400 range, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the university's rising ranking but somewhat negative reputation, overall low major popularity, and a slight increase in candidate numbers, competition is expected to intensify slightly (ranking number moves slightly forward) based on the 2025 baseline of 7323; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7293, with a range of 6793–7793.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7293, with a range of 6793–7793. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 6793) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Biological Sciences, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation); those in the middle of the range (about 7000–7500) should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Forestry, Plant Production, etc.); those at the upper end of the range (outside 7500) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Animal Science, Landscape Architecture, Civil Engineering).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1146 → 1057 → 2433 → 1512 → 1582. In 2023, there was an abnormal significant drop (rank 2433), and in 2024–2025 it stabilized to the 1500–1600 range; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1582. The enrollment plan for History Category in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2024 was 4, 4, 4, and 6 students respectively, with 6 students in 2025 and still 6 students in 2026. The plan has remained unchanged for two consecutive years, with no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to controversy from a recruitment announcement, but this event has limited relevance to undergraduate admissions. Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (average), with no obvious abnormal application heat. There is no record of admission gaps in history. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. The History Category enrollment majors (Finance and Taxation, Business Administration, Journalism) have no direct corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category enrollment majors, Finance and Taxation corresponds to Finance/Economics/Economy (differentiated wait-and-see), Business Administration corresponds to Business Administration (clearly discouraged), and Journalism corresponds to Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged). Overall, the social popularity of these majors is relatively low. The total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 48,000, with an estimated 17,300 in History Category based on historical proportions, a slight increase from 17,212 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stabilization of historical rankings in the 1500–1600 range after the 2023 anomaly, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous rise in university ranking but slightly negative reputation, the overall low popularity of majors, and a small increase in the number of candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 1582, competition is expected to intensify slightly (ranking number moves slightly forward). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1562, with a range of 1262–1862.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1562, range 1262–1862. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1262) can aim for Tier 1 majors (Finance and Taxation); those in the middle range (approximately 1400–1700) should focus on Tier 2 majors (Business Administration); those at the upper end of the range (outside 1700) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Journalism).
